reviews.review_title: NEEDS FIXING BLOODY STUPID ITS NOT FIXED
reviews.review_description: Doesn't work on  my s 9   fed up was good but now total waste of time FIX THE PROBLEM

reviews.review_title: App crashes on launch with S9+
reviews.review_description: There is a distorted attempt of a stereo image as you see the first logo. Very uncomfortabe. Then it crashes right back to Oculus home. Please fix this as I'm no longer able to get a refund from Oculus as I waited too long trying to troubleshoot for requesting a refund. Thanks in advance. :(
Some areas when the camera speeds up make me a bit uncomfortable but overall it's a nice looking demo.
I've been playing these since dk2. Keep it up, because these games are extremely enjoyable.
Kind of intense and immersive. The "game" itself is very basic and short. The movement is not gentle to the stomach. It made me nauseous - and I don't usually get nauseous in VR.

Simple idea. Not much too it, but found myself looking around and admiring the scenery; right up to the gut wrenching roller-coaster-like sections that left me mass worried about dodgy neurons, and more worried about losing my Starbucks and blueberry muffin. Still, if you can handle it, it's a good ride.

reviews.review_title: Won't play on my Galaxy S9+
reviews.review_description: Please fix the issue with this and Galaxy S9+.
This very short game is a nice introduction for those new to VR. It can be a bit intense on some occasions and might cause dizziness or nausea, so be prepared for that.
A great little experience, not much to it but it's a lot of fun. It's basically a lead in to the developer's more involved app: InCell
